files.prompt: Loopable old industrial conveyor belt running in a cargo dock. Low electric motor hum, metal rollers clicking rhythmically, intermittent rusty creaks, subtle chain movement. Clean close game sound effect, seamless loop, no music, no voices. Variation 1: make this version distinct from the others, but keep the same timing, scale, and dry game-ready style.
